creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
audio/musicpd checks for libsamplerate in configure.
So if you install libsamplerate first, and install musicpd, and remove libsamplerate, musicpd would be unusable.
But it's not a config option, nor a dependecy.

Fix: 

Add libsamplerate as a dependecy or a config option.
How-To-Repeat: 1. Install audio/libsamplerate
2. Install audio/musicpd
3. Remove audio/libsamplerate
4. run mpd
